positive: A vibrant, minimalist geometric pattern featuring stylized mountain peaks, gentle crescent moons, and abstract cosmic dust. The style is Pacific Northwest inspired neo-art deco, utilizing clean, thick outlines and flat blocks of color. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed to repeat cleanly on fabric. Primary color palette: deep indigo blue, muted sage green, terracotta orange, and cream white accents. Strong, balanced contrast and high readability for apparel printing. Vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, text, logo, signature, low detail, messy, grain, gradient, 3d, photo, photorealistic, extra limbs, bad anatomy
